UW-15  WELDED JOINT DESIGN DETAILS. (a) Acceptable types of welded joints for Category A, B, C, and D joints as defined in UW-3 are shown in the illustrations of this paragraph. (b) Full penetration butt welds are required for Category A and B joints when the joint efficiency of UW-12 exceeds 0.80. (c) Corner joints and fillet welds are acceptable for certain Category C and D joints, provided that the weld size meets the requirements of UW-16 and UW-35. Joint design shall account for the loads of UG-22. See also UW-9 for general joint design. Refer to UW-49 for nozzle attachment details.
